name: Key Lime Pie (Nutrasweet)
recipeIngredient: 8 oz (1) Package Reduced Fat Cream Cheese, Softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine Graham cracker crumbs, melted margarine, and 2 tablespoons NutraSweet (r) Spoonful (tm) in the bottom of a 7-inch springform pan. Press evenly on the bottom and up the side of the pan.
2. Sprinkle gelatin over half a cup of the milk in a small saucepan. Let stand for 2 to 3 minutes.
3. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the gelatin is dissolved.
4. Beat cream cheese until fluffy in a separate bowl. Add the remaining 1 3/4 cups milk and the gelatin mixture.
5. Mix in lime juice and 1/2 cup NutraSweet (r) Spoonful (tm).
6. Refrigerate the pie until set, about 2 hours.
7. To serve: Loosen the side of the pie pan with a small spatula and remove the side of the pan. Place the pie on a serving plate. Garnish with lime slices and mint.
8. Makes 8 servings
Nutritional Information:
Serving size 1/8 pie (45-degree slice)
Calories: 150
Saturated Fat: ~3g
Protein: 10g
Diabetic Food Exchange: 1 starch, 2 fat
